extraction.one_line_summary: BAIS Davide won from a four-man breakaway at Gran Sasso after INEOS controlled for LEKNESSUND without contesting the stage.
tactical_patterns: INEOS controlled exclusively to protect LEKNESSUND's pink jersey without defending intermediate sprint points, revealing pure GC focus.
Four-man breakaway established inside 10km when peloton surrendered stage immediately, indicating pre-race agreement on altitude summit handover.
MULUBRHAN dropped mid-stage from breakaway on sustained climbing, suggesting four-rider groups tactically unstable before final ascent.

rider_signals.BAIS Davide: positive: second Giro stage win in three career participations shows exceptional breakaway conversion rate
rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: neutral: extended maglia rosa tenure record but team showed no ambition beyond jersey defense
rider_signals.PETILLI Simone: positive: podium finish from early breakaway despite zero prior victories demonstrates improving positioning
rider_signals.MULUBRHAN Henok: negative: dropped mid-stage from four-man group before final climb reveals insufficient endurance for sustained breakaway efforts
